Data.Explanation: The Azure CLI first-party app does not include Sites.Read.All in its pre-consented scope set. Use a custom app registration with Sites.Read.All granted, or run with application-level credentials.
Data.Impact: Only the root site and M365-group-connected sites were discovered. Standalone sites created outside groups are not included. Oversharing analysis is partial.

Description: SharePoint site discovery used fallback — Sites.Read.All scope not available in the current token
